title: Lesson 177: (Grammar) - that being the case; because of ...; the reason is...

intro_cards.title: Soft Reason: ので
intro_cards.body:
ので expresses reason softly and politely — 'because / since / so.'

Pattern: [plain/polite clause]ので, [result]

• 疲れているので、早く帰ります。
(Since I'm tired, I'll go home early.)
• 明日試験があるので、今日は勉強します。
(I have an exam tomorrow, so I'll study today.)

な/の before ので:
• 静かなので (because it's quiet — な-adj)
• 先生なので (because I'm a teacher — noun)

Key difference:
• ので — polite, objective reason
• から — direct, personal reason; more casual
